synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20922 Important: Oracle Linux 9 webkit2gtk3 security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20922

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20922.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
webkit2gtk3-2.50.1-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
webkit2gtk3-2.50.1-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
webkit2gtk3-devel-2.50.1-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
webkit2gtk3-devel-2.50.1-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
webkit2gtk3-jsc-2.50.1-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
webkit2gtk3-jsc-2.50.1-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
webkit2gtk3-jsc-devel-2.50.1-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
webkit2gtk3-jsc-devel-2.50.1-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
webkit2gtk3-2.50.1-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
webkit2gtk3-devel-2.50.1-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
webkit2gtk3-jsc-2.50.1-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
webkit2gtk3-jsc-devel-2.50.1-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/webkit2gtk3-2.50.1-1.el9_7.src.rpm
